# SepticRooter of Atlanta

> Metro Atlanta and North Georgia's trusted septic company since 1989. Family-owned, BBB A+ accredited, GA licensed and insured. Eljen GSF certified installer.

## Contact
- Phone / text: (678) 744-7878
- Email: sales@septicrooter.com
- Address: 4355 Shallowford Industrial Pkwy, Suite D, Marietta, GA 30066
- Service area: 70+ cities and counties across Metro Atlanta and North Georgia

## Services
- Homebuyer septic inspections — flat $299, full written report + video: https://www.septicrooter.com/septic-inspections/
- Septic system repairs: https://www.septicrooter.com/septic-repair/
- Septic system replacement (permits pulled, county inspection guaranteed): https://www.septicrooter.com/septic-replacement/
- Alternative systems & Eljen GSF (aerobic, drip, mound): https://georgiaeljenseptic.com/metro-atlanta
- Emergency pump-alarm service (same-day): https://www.septicrooter.com/septic-pump-alarm/

## Areas served
https://www.septicrooter.com/locations/

## Key facts
- Pump your septic tank every 3–5 years.
- Same-day emergency response across Metro Atlanta.
- Founded 1989 as Edwards Septic Tank Service in Statham, GA.
